title: Heavy Dubstep Drop
summary: 140 BPM dubstep with wobble bass, growling synths, massive drop on the half-time bar.
prompt: A heavy modern dubstep instrumental at 140 BPM (half-time feel on the drop). Tight building intro with sub-bass rumble, snappy snare on 3, vocal-chop tension riser, then a massive drop with growling wobble bass, neuro-style metallic synth stabs, distorted sub kicks, and laser FX. Festival main-stage bass-music energy - intense and head-banging.
